rule: Prefer the document closest to the affected product. A higher tier outranks a lower one as authority.

examples: vendor product docs not part of the canonical spec

spec.override_note: When a generic spec is more correct than a vendor doc on a contested point, prioritize the spec and record the rationale (SKILL.md step 6).

examples: the repo's own committed config/code as a fact about itself
repo.note: Authority only for facts about the repo, not for external behavior.

conflict_rule: A genuine contradiction between official sources is escalated to blocking_gaps, never resolved silently.
